title: trimeniaceae
intro: The rank Trimeniaceae is a family of plants, specifically a group of flowering plants that are typically woody or shrub-like in habit. This family is characterized by its unique combination of characteristics, such as the presence of pinnate leaves and small, inconspicuous flowers. Trimeniaceae are native to the tropical regions of the world, particularly in the Pacific Islands and Australia. They are relatively rare and are often found growing in shaded, humid environments.
